help-text.$description: Recipe tokens for sando-help-text component. Displays helper, error, success, and warning messages below form inputs. Uses fixed caption typography (industry standard).

textColor.description: Default helper text color - subtle caption style

iconColor.description: Default icon color - muted to not distract

textColor.description: Error state text color - high visibility for form errors

iconColor.description: Error state icon color - matches text for consistency

textColor.description: Success state text color - positive feedback

iconColor.description: Success state icon color - matches text for consistency

textColor.description: Warning state text color - caution indicator

iconColor.description: Warning state icon color - matches text for consistency

fontSize.description: Fixed caption font size (industry standard: helper text size is independent of input size)

minHeight.description: Reserved space for help text - CRITICAL: prevents layout shift when text appears/disappears

fontFamily.description: Font family for help text - matches body text

marginTop.description: Spacing between input and help text (4px)

gap.description: Gap between icon and text content (4px)
